tasks.subject: Task 0: Branch + version bump
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cut feature/v0.3.0 off develop and bump workspace version to 0.3.0.

**Files:** Cargo.toml (workspace.package.version)

**Verify:** `cargo build --workspace`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["on feature/v0.3.0 branch", "workspace version 0.3.0", "build clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: FileRule types in safessh-storage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add FileRule + FileDecision; extend Policy with `#[serde(default)] file_rules`. v0.2 TOML round-trips unchanged.

**Files:** crates/safessh-storage/src/project.rs, crates/safessh-storage/tests/file_rules.rs

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-storage --test file_rules`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-storage/src/project.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/tests/file_rules.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-storage --test file_rules", "acceptanceCriteria": ["v0.2 backward compat", "all decisions parse", "bad decision error", "round-trip"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Embedded preset deny-list
tasks.description:
**Goal:** include_str!-embedded presets.toml + preset_file_rules() accessor.

**Files:** crates/safessh-storage/src/policies/mod.rs, crates/safessh-storage/src/policies/presets.toml, crates/safessh-storage/src/lib.rs, crates/safessh-storage/tests/presets.rs

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-storage --test presets`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-storage/src/policies/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/src/policies/presets.toml", "crates/safessh-storage/src/lib.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/tests/presets.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-storage --test presets", "acceptanceCriteria": ["preset_file_rules() returns parsed list", "required sensitive paths covered", "every entry is deny"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Policy engine — FileOp, match_file_rules, preset precedence
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend decide() with FileOp + match_file_rules. SAFETY-INVARIANT-14 (preset > project). v0.2 tests still pass.

**Files:** crates/safessh-policy/Cargo.toml (+globset), crates/safessh-policy/src/decision.rs, crates/safessh-policy/src/lib.rs, crates/safessh-policy/tests/file_decision.rs

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-policy`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-policy/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-policy/src/decision.rs", "crates/safessh-policy/src/lib.rs", "crates/safessh-policy/tests/file_decision.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-policy", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FileOp added", "preset > project precedence", "SAFETY-INVARIANT-14 marker", "v0.2 tests pass", "** vs * globs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: SshDriver trait extension + mock impl
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Trait read_file/write_file + result types. Mock with in-memory map; OpenSshDriver gets stubs (real impls in 5/6).

**Files:** crates/safessh-ssh/src/driver.rs, crates/safessh-ssh/src/mock.rs, crates/safessh-ssh/src/openssh.rs (stubs), crates/safessh-ssh/tests/mock_files.rs

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-ssh --test mock_files`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-ssh/src/driver.rs", "crates/safessh-ssh/src/mock.rs", "crates/safessh-ssh/src/openssh.rs", "crates/safessh-ssh/tests/mock_files.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-ssh --test mock_files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["trait extended", "FileReadResult/FileWriteResult", "mock cap truncation", "mock NotFound", "write-then-read round trips"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: OpenSshDriver::read_file — sftp batch with cap
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real read_file driving sftp -b - over ControlMaster. realpath + cap-driven kill.

**Files:** crates/safessh-ssh/src/openssh.rs

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-ssh`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-ssh/src/openssh.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-ssh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sftp -b - via ControlMaster", "cap-driven truncation", "realpath resolution", "no-such-file error class"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: OpenSshDriver::write_file — atomic temp + rename
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Atomic remote write via temp + sftp rename. SAFETY-INVARIANT-13.

**Files:** crates/safessh-ssh/Cargo.toml (rand, tempfile), crates/safessh-ssh/src/openssh.rs

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-ssh`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-ssh/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-ssh/src/openssh.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-ssh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sftp put + rename", "tempfile cleanup on failure", "SAFETY-INVARIANT-13 marker", "atomic semantics"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: commands/file_common.rs — shared decide+audit helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reusable file-op decide+audit helper. SAFETY-INVARIANT-4 by structure.

**Files:** crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/file_common.rs, crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/mod.rs, crates/safessh-audit/src/event.rs

**Verify:** `cargo build --package safessh-cli --package safessh-audit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/file_common.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-audit/src/event.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --package safessh-cli --package safessh-audit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["decide_file_op writes audit attempt", "sha256_hex helper", "audit event constructors", "no SSH I/O"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: commands/read.rs — safessh project read path
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end read subcommand: argv → policy → sftp read → redactor → framed stdout → _complete audit.

**Files:** crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/read.rs, crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/mod.rs, crates/safessh-cli/tests/read_cli.rs

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli --test read_cli`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/read.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/read_cli.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli --test read_cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["framed stdout", "audit attempt+complete", "--on routing", "all-decision exit codes", "redactor applied"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: commands/write.rs — safessh project write path
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Write subcommand. Stdin cap. No redaction. Adds file_write_cap_bytes.

**Files:** crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/write.rs, crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/mod.rs, crates/safessh-cli/tests/write_cli.rs, crates/safessh-storage/src/project.rs

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli --test write_cli`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/write.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/write_cli.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/src/project.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli --test write_cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["happy path round trip", "stdin cap → exit 30 no write", "approval flow exit 10", "no redaction"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Verb dispatch — route read/write from External
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make exec.rs helpers visible; main.rs routes External args[1].

**Files:** crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/exec.rs, crates/safessh-cli/src/main.rs, crates/safessh-cli/tests/dispatch.rs

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-cli`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/exec.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/main.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/dispatch.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["read routes correctly", "write routes correctly", "exec unchanged", "unknown verb exit 2"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Container integration tests for sftp
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real sftp behind --features integration: dockerized OpenSSH; read /etc/hostname; atomic write+readback; preset blocks /etc/shadow.

**Files:** tests/integration/sftp.rs, tests/fixtures/integration/, Cargo.toml

**Verify:** `cargo test --workspace --features integration` (Linux only)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/integration/sftp.rs", "tests/fixtures/integration/", "Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --workspace --features integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["read /etc/hostname", "atomic write+readback", "preset blocks /etc/shadow at exit 12"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Embedded skill markdown — file ops section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Reading and writing files section to safessh.md; re-snapshot insta.

**Files:** crates/safessh-skill/src/safessh.md

**Verify:** `cargo test --package safessh-skill && cargo insta accept --package safessh-skill`


tasks.subject: Task 16: New docs/policy.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Standalone policy reference with categories, file_rules, glob syntax, decision precedence, presets.

**Files:** docs/policy.md

**Verify:** wc -l < 350

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/policy.md"], "verifyCommand": "wc -l docs/policy.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["under 350 lines", "categories cross-link", "file_rules examples", "precedence documented", "preset cannot override"]}
```

tasks.description:

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/files.md"], "verifyCommand": "wc -l docs/files.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["under 250 lines", "runnable examples", "--from-file rationale", "cross-link policy.md"]}
```

tasks.description:
**Goal:** Top-level docs reflect shipped v0.3.

**Files:** README.md, CHANGELOG.md, docs/cli-reference.md, docs/development.md

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "CHANGELOG.md", "docs/cli-reference.md", "docs/development.md"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README features row", "CHANGELOG [0.3.0]", "cli-reference read/write", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 19: Release rehearsal — rc.1 → v0.3.0
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Merge → tag rc.1 → clean-machine verify (macOS arm64 + Linux x86_64) → promote v0.3.0 → back-merge.

**Files:** docs/RELEASE-CHECKLIST.md, CHANGELOG.md (release date)

**Verify:** Manual.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/RELEASE-CHECKLIST.md", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "manual", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rc.1 cargo-dist artifacts", "macOS clean run", "Linux container clean run", "v0.3.0 tag", "back-merge to develop"]}
```
